info.description:
Interactive reference for every provider operation in the ApiFuse registry.

## Try it out from this page

The interactive request runner presents the same `/v1/{providerId}/{operationId}` path shape used by the public Gateway API, but sends browser requests through the Platform docs adapter at `/api/proxy/call/v1/...`. Signed-in users receive a short-lived Gateway delegation token; public demo execution uses server-side authorization and never exposes bearer tokens to the browser.

## Production usage

For production traffic, send requests directly to the gateway at `https://api.apifuse.com/v1/{providerId}/{operationId}` with your own bearer token. The auth contract is documented in the [Authentication guide](/docs/guide/auth-levels).

## Generated artifact

This document is generated from the provider registry catalog projection. To update, edit the relevant `providers/<id>/index.ts` and run `bun run build:provider-registry`.

post.description:
Retrieves real-time air quality measurements from an AirKorea monitoring station, including PM10, PM2.5, NO2, O3, SO2, CO, and the comprehensive KHAI index. Use when the user asks about current air quality, fine dust levels, or pollution at a specific Korean location. Do NOT use for weather forecasts — use kma:short-forecast instead. Returns pollutant values with grade levels (good/moderate/bad/very_bad).
Provides a consistent station-level air quality object by organizing air quality grade codes and string measurements.

# AirKorea Real-time Air Pollution

Provides a consistent station-level air quality object by organizing air quality grade codes and string measurements.

## Normalization notes

- Normalizes the first measurement in the items array into a single station/measuredAt object.
- Standardizes pm10/pm25/no2/o3/so2/co/khai values into the { value, grade } structure.
- Converts '-' and empty values to null and maps grade numbers to the good/moderate/bad/very_bad enum.
- Converts the dataTime string to an ISO 8601 KST measuredAt value.

post.description:
Use this operation when the user has received a Modu Parking SMS code and wants to start payment. It verifies the code, logs in as a guest, and creates either a coupon or shared-parking payment webview URL. Business rule: ticket payments are preflighted before SMS using current ticket price/window data; shared payments are preflighted for duration/price before SMS, but Modu can still reject the final payment URL creation with code NOT_PURCHASABLE when the shared space is full or already in use.
SMS 인증번호를 검증한 뒤 쿠폰권 또는 공유 주차 결제 웹뷰 URL을 생성합니다. 공유 주차는 시간/가격 조회 후에도 결제 URL 생성 시점에 만차/사용중으로 거절될 수 있으며 이 경우 NOT_PURCHASABLE을 반환합니다.

# Naver Flight round-trip search

- The provider models Naver's current international search request with adultCount=1, seatClass=Y, and isNonstop=true.
